passives.name: Spellblade
passives.effects: After using an [[Champion ability|ability]], your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals {{as|125% '''base''' AD}} {{as|(+ {{pp|0 to 50|0 to 100 for 11|label1=% critical strike chance|showtype=false|formula=0.5 damage for every 1% critical strike chance}} based on critical strike chance)}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]] and restores {{as|mana}} equal to{{ft|50% of that amount|{{as|{{ap|125*0.5}}% '''base''' AD}} {{as|(+ {{pp|0 to 25|0 to 100 for 11|label1=% critical strike chance|showtype=false|formula=0.25 mana restored for every 1% critical strike chance}} based on critical strike chance)}}}}({{fd|1.5}} second cooldown, starts after using the empowered attack).

effects_structured.raw: After using an [[Champion ability ability]], your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals {{as 125% '''base''' AD}} {{as (+ {{pp 0 to 50 0 to 100 for 11 label1=% critical strike chance showtype=false formula=0.5 damage for every 1% critical strike chance}} based on critical strike chance)}} {{as '''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]] and restores {{as mana}} equal to{{ft 50% of that amount {{as {{ap 125*0.5}}% '''base''' AD}} {{as (+ {{pp 0 to 25 0 to 100 for 11 label1=% critical strike chance showtype=false formula=0.25 mana restored for every 1% critical strike chance}} based on critical strike chance)}}}}({{fd 1.5}} second cooldown, starts after using the empowered attack).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Essence Reaver is modeled as an ability-weave marksman spike item: the post-ability Spellblade hit delivers bonus physical damage and refunds mana on the same empowered attack.
